cpu: AMD Ryzen 5 2400G with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes: Out of the box, it works just fine. Controls are responsive on a Hayabusa Rap.4, there aren't any frame drops, music works fine. Issue is connection online, in which prior to matches I tend to disconnect, while after matches it takes a long time to sync. DURING the match, it plays just fine.
title: Arcana Heart 3 LOVEMAX SIXSTARS!!!!!!
